description: Redesign Account, Wallet, Loyalty, Favorites, Addresses, Notifications, Settings, and Support screens
steps: Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/account/presentation/account_screen.dart: profile card at top with gradient background and avatar (user initial in circle with gradient border), wallet balance card with gradient (emerald gradient), loyalty points ring/progress indicator, menu grid (2x3 or 2x4) with colorful icons in rounded squares instead of list tiles, animated section transitions, logout at bottom with confirmation dialog

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/account/presentation/wallet_screen.dart: large balance card with gradient background (emerald to teal), 'Add Money' button, transaction list with date group headers, filter tabs (All, Credits, Debits), transaction items with colored icons (green arrow down for credit, red arrow up for debit), pull-to-refresh, shimmer loading

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/account/presentation/loyalty_screen.dart: points balance with animated circular progress ring showing tier progress (CustomPainter or CircularProgressIndicator), tier badges section (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum with icons), earn rules info cards, redemption history list grouped by date, animated number counter for points

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/account/presentation/favorites_screen.dart: grid layout (2 columns) matching the product card design from FEAT-003, quick add-to-cart button on each card, remove from favorites via heart icon toggle, empty state with heart illustration, shimmer loading

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/account/presentation/addresses_screen.dart: address cards with map pin header decoration, default badge, swipe actions (edit/delete) using Dismissible, 'Add New Address' floating button, empty state, each card shows label (Home/Work/Other) with icon

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/account/presentation/notifications_screen.dart: grouped by date (Today, Yesterday, Earlier), read/unread styling (bold title + blue dot for unread), icon per notification type (order=receipt, delivery=truck, promo=tag, system=bell), swipe to dismiss/mark read, empty state, pull-to-refresh

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/account/presentation/settings_screen.dart: toggle switches for notifications with modern Material 3 style, theme selector section (System/Light/Dark) with radio buttons or segmented control, app version info, clear cache option, about section with links, dark mode live preview toggle

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/support/presentation/support_screen.dart: ticket cards with colored status badges (open=blue, in-progress=orange, resolved=green, closed=grey), last message preview, timestamp, FAB for new ticket with scale animation, empty state illustration, filter by status tabs

Create mobile/lib/features/account/providers/account_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for: wallet balance/transactions, loyalty points/history, favorites list, addresses list, notifications list, settings preferences
acceptance_criteria: Account screen has gradient profile card and menu grid layout
Wallet screen has gradient balance card and filter tabs
Loyalty screen has circular progress ring for tier progress
Favorites screen uses grid layout with product cards
Addresses screen has swipe actions via Dismissible
Notifications screen groups by date with read/unread styling
Settings screen has theme selector and toggle switches
Support screen has colored status badges and filter tabs
Account provider file exists with necessary state management
verification: Verify account_screen.dart has gradient card and grid menu
Verify wallet_screen.dart has filter tabs (All, Credits, Debits)
Verify loyalty_screen.dart has progress ring widget
Verify notifications_screen.dart has date grouping logic
Verify support_screen.dart has status filter tabs
findings: All 9 screens redesigned successfully. account_provider.dart created with walletProvider, loyaltyProvider, favoritesProvider, addressesProvider, notificationsProvider, settingsProvider (StateNotifier), and supportTicketsProvider. All screens converted to ConsumerStatefulWidget using ref.watch() pattern. GradientCard factories and AnimatedFadeIn staggering used throughout. Cannot run flutter analyze as SDK not installed but all imports follow established patterns.
